name: Sausage & Pepper Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick 12-inch skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add red peppers and onion and cook until tender and lightly browned, about 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add garlic; cook for an additional minute, stirring.
4. Set vegetables aside to cool slightly.
5. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
6. In a large bowl, mix sausage meat, ground beef, eggs, bread crumbs, Parmesan, tomato sauce, salt, and cooked vegetables just until well combined but not overmixed.
7. Shape the meat mixture into a 9x5-inch loaf in a 13x9 metal baking pan.
8. Bake the meat loaf for 1 hour.
9. Sprinkle Fontina cheese down the center of the loaf in a 2-inch wide strip.
10. Bake for an additional 10 minutes longer.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
